logger.message: Salesforce login raw response received. correlationId=#[correlationId]
logger.doc:name: Log login response

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java ns soapenv http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/ ns sf urn:partner.soap.sforce.com --- payload.soapenv#Envelope.soapenv#Body.sf#loginResponse.sf#result.sf#sessionId as String

%dw 2.0 output application/java ns soapenv http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/ ns sf urn:partner.soap.sforce.com --- payload.soapenv#Envelope.soapenv#Body.sf#loginResponse.sf#result.sf#serverUrl as String

%dw 2.0 output application/java ns soapenv http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/ ns sf urn:partner.soap.sforce.com var serverUrl = payload.soapenv#Envelope.soapenv#Body.sf#loginResponse.sf#result.sf#serverUrl as String --- (serverUrl replace "https://" with "" splitBy "/")[0]

set-variable.value: SELECT Id, Name, Phone, Website, BillingCity, BillingCountry FROM Account LIMIT 20
set-variable.doc:name: Set SOQL

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var sourceRecords = vars.sfRecords default [] --- { correlationId: correlationId, source: "salesforce", syncedAt: now() as String, totalRecords: sizeOf(sourceRecords), customers: sourceRecords map (item) -> { salesforceId: item.Id, externalId: item.Id, name: item.Name, phone: item.Phone default null, website: item.Website default null, billingCity: item.BillingCity default null, billingCountry: item.BillingCountry default null, active: true } }

logger.message: Sending #[payload.totalRecords default 0] customer records to ERP. correlationId=#[correlationId]
logger.doc:name: Log ERP send

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "UP", app: "sf-mule-erp-sync-props", timestamp: now() as String }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, message: "Salesforce accounts synced to ERP", correlationId: correlationId, erpResponse: payload }

logger.message: #["Salesforce SOAP/login sync failed. Description = " ++ (error.description default "no description")]
logger.doc:name: Log error description

logger.message: #["Salesforce SOAP/login sync failed. Full error = " ++ write(error, "application/json")]
logger.doc:name: Log full error

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, correlationId: correlationId, errorType: error.errorType.identifier, message: error.description default "Unexpected error during Salesforce to ERP sync" }
